home.role: I'm a fullstack Developer who transforms ideas into solutions, from the database to the final click.

about.subtitle: Who am I
about.p1_1: With 5 years of experience in the tech industry, I focus on building robust and scalable systems. My journey as a
about.p1_2: allowed me to navigate between the rigor of C# back-ends and the agility of the React ecosystem.
about.p2_2: , I always strive to write clean and maintainable code, ensuring the technical solution aligns with business goals.
about.p3: I am a fullstack developer who turns ideas into end-to-end solutions.

list.title: MentoriaAI
list.desc: Intelligent mentoring platform developed with React, .NET, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch and Docker. It connects users to mentors efficiently through semantic searches.

list.title: ChartMaker
list.desc: Web application for creating and viewing dynamic charts. Developed with a focus on data analysis, allowing the generation of interactive and customizable dashboards simply and quickly.

list.title: LIDAR Visualizer
list.desc: System for real-time visualization of LIDAR sensor data using ESP32 and C#. It converts distance readings into XY coordinates for graphical display and obstacle detection.

list.title: Smart Commerce App
list.desc: Mobile application developed in React Native to promote local businesses. The system features dynamic listings, reviews, business hours, and API integration for data management.

skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I use to build modern and performant solutions.
